// note: Manual reference only — the easy path is `npm run install-hooks` (works on Windows & macOS, writes the right paths automatically). If hand-editing, paste "hooks" into ~/.claude/settings.json and fix the path to where you cloned this repo. Windows uses a path like C:\workspace\pets\hooks\hook.js (shown below); macOS uses a POSIX path like /Users/you/workspace/hal-9000-pet/hooks/hook.js.
